goal: Add a side-effect-free receipt authority builder that records cockpit patch consume execution receipt authorization from ready receipt preflight while keeping permit consume, receipt recording, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume permits, record receipts, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready cockpit patch consume execution receipt preflight can produce a side-effect-free receipt authorization artifact.
Receipt authority id, authorizer, and expiry refs are required.
Receipt recording and patch application remain false.
assumptions: Actual receipt recording and patch application require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing authority id, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit consumption, receipt recording, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-139 preflighted cockpit patch consume execution receipt without recording it.
